conclusion: The d5_276 defect markers can be injected directly into the finite exactness CSP. The resulting search tests whether the residual five-color assembly obstruction is already resolved by a tiny Route-E-style refinement of the d5_274 class family.
family: Refine d5_274 by adding the two d5_276 defect markers g_anchor = 1_{x2=m-1 and x0+2x1+x4=1 mod m} and m_bad = 1_{x4=m-1, x2!=m-1, 2x0+3x1=1 mod 3}.
